title: Open Links in docs in the same tab
excerpt:
Links to other Workdocs open in a new window. We would like to use Workdocs as a Wiki and opening every link in a new tab takes away from the natural wiki like browsing experience.

posts.author: involuntary_admin (Arun Nayagam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Links to other Workdocs open in a new window. We would like to use Workdocs as a Wiki and opening every link in a new tab takes away from the natural wiki like browsing experience.

Can you add a setting that controls this behavior (even a global setting on a per Workspace level should be sufficient)
